items.title: DeepSeek could hit $45B valuation from its first investment round
items.summary: In just a few weeks of talks, DeepSeek's potential valuation has reportedly soared from $20 billion to $45 billion.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: I Am Begging AI Companies to Stop Naming Features After Human Processes
items.summary: Anthropic announced “dreaming” for AI agents to sort through “memories” at its developer conference. Can we not?
